title: platostoma leptochilon
intro: Platostoma leptochilon, also known as wild basil or African blue basil, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding digestion. Platostoma leptochilon is typically prepared as a tea or used in herbal infusions, and its essential oil can be extracted for use in aromatherapy.
